variants.name: 毛毛虫
variants.ability: 与你邻近的存活玩家之一醉酒 (每个夜晚都会与上个夜晚不同)。

variants.name: 毛毛虫
variants.ability: 每个夜晚, 与你邻近的存活玩家之一醉酒 (与上个夜晚不同)。
variants.firstNightReminder: Place the *DRUNK* token on a living neighbour. :reminder:
variants.otherNightReminder: Place the *DRUNK* token on a living neighbour different from the previous night. :reminder:
variants.flavor: You'll get used to it in time” said the Caterpillar; and it put the hookah into its mouth and began smoking again.
